metadata.description: kyzdes' personal Claude Code skill marketplace.

plugins.name: keys-keeper
plugins.description: Cross-platform (macOS + Windows + Linux) secrets manager skill: stores API keys, SSH keys, server creds, and domain info in the OS-native credential store (macOS Keychain / Windows Credential Manager / Linux Secret Service, encrypted-file fallback on headless servers) via the `keys` CLI. Agents architecturally cannot reveal plaintext (Sealed wrapper + env-gated reveal). First-class Claude Code skill; `keys init` emits equivalent rule files for Cursor, Aider, Codex CLI, and Cline.

plugins.name: ux-planner
plugins.description: Turn loose product descriptions into structured English UX Specs ready for handoff to a visual-design agent.

plugins.name: context-map
plugins.description: Generate, update, audit, and conflict-check project context-map.md files for AI coding agents — project memory that survives context resets.

plugins.name: trip-planner
plugins.description: Extract flight + hotel data from Aviasales / Ostrovok links and compile into a self-contained HTML itinerary.

plugins.name: stitch-design
plugins.description: Google Stitch AI UI generation — brainstorm, generate, edit, iterate on UI designs from text prompts. Bundles 4 sub-skills (design / theme / edit / upload).

plugins.name: agent-docs-architect
plugins.description: Decompose a complex codebase into layered, agent-readable docs (top-level MAP + per-domain deep docs + distributed CLAUDE.md) with a CI gate that keeps them fresh. Parallel subagent dispatch for ≥5 domains.
